seoHomeTitle: Aimoda - Global One-Stop Fashion AI Design Agent
seoHomeDescription: Aimoda helps fashion teams search styles, explore design inspiration, and track trends in one AI-powered workflow.
seoNoindexDescription: This page requires login or subscription access and is excluded from public indexing.
renameSessionHint: Give this session a clearer title so it stays easy to find later.
sessionFailedMessage: “{{title}}” failed. Return to the session for details.
describeStyle: Describe your desired clothing style, elements, or colors, and the AI assistant will provide professional fashion design suggestions.
autoRegister: Unregistered accounts will be automatically registered after verification.
agreeToTerms: By logging in or registering, you agree to the
fillAccount: Please enter email or phone number
backendNotReady: Backend is not ready yet, please wait for future updates
globalOneStopAI: Global One-Stop Fashion AI Design Agent
placeholderStyle: Describe your clothing style, elements, colors
brandTagline: Fashion trend insight daily, gathering global fashion week highlights to help you grasp market pulse and make wise decisions.
galleriesDesc: Manage all inspiration gallery titles, covers, and image deletion across the platform.
redeemHint: Enter code to activate or extend subscription
deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this content? This action cannot be undone.
deleteCatalogImageConfirm: Delete this image from the database? This cannot be undone ({{target}}).
deleteCatalogImageFailed: Failed to delete the image. Please try again.
chatInputPlaceholder: Describe what you want, like "find a red dress" or "trench coat with mini skirt"...
chatEmptyHint: Describe the look in your mind and I'll help you find it on the runway.
chatSessionLoadFailedHint: The network did not return this session in time. Please try again.
parallelSearchHint: This search is still running. If you want to explore a new direction in parallel, start a new session.
searchResultSummary: {{count}} matching images are ready for review.
searchResultSummaryWithFilters: {{count}} matching images are ready for review with {{filters}} filters applied.
resultPreviewUnavailable: Preview is temporarily unavailable. Open the result set to load the current ordering.
inspirationEmptyHint: The AI agent is collecting more inspiration...
escExitFocus: Press Esc to exit focus view
drawerEmptyTitle: No images in this result set
drawerEmptyHint: This result entry opened successfully, but there are no images to display right now. You can continue refining the query in chat or open another result entry.
drawerUnavailableHint: This result entry is currently unavailable. The underlying search result may be stale or was not persisted successfully.
imageInteractionHint: Double-click to zoom, drag to inspect details
chatPreferencesHint: These settings act as the session's default retrieval constraints unless the current message overrides them.
dnaPreferenceHint: Apply a DNA collection as the default preference so new searches naturally lean toward your personal style DNA.
favoriteCollectionsEmpty: No DNA collections yet. Save an image from detail to start building your first one.
favoriteCollectionDetailFailed: Failed to load DNA collection details
favoriteCollectionSelectHint: Choose a DNA collection to manage its title, note, and saved images.
favoriteCollectionsPageHint: A DNA collection is more than a bookmark set; it captures a reusable style DNA that can steer retrieval and recommendations.
dnaCollectionsHeroTitle: Turn scattered preferences into reusable style DNA so every search feels more like you.
dnaCollectionsStepReuse: Reuse it in retrieval and recommendations
favoriteCollectionNamePlaceholder: DNA collection name, for example: Severe Minimal / Soft Commute
favoriteCollectionDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the aesthetic, brand direction, or style DNA this collection represents
favoriteDialogHint: Add this image to a DNA collection so its style signals can shape future retrieval and recommendations.
favoriteCreatedAndSaved: DNA collection created and image added
favoriteDrawerHint: Apply a DNA collection to this result set to bias ranking with reusable style DNA, without changing the underlying retrieval scope.
favoriteDefaultPreferenceHint: Apply a DNA collection as the default ranking bias for new result drawers while keeping per-drawer switching available.
deletedImageUnavailableTitle: This image is no longer available
deletedImageUnavailableHint: An administrator removed it from the catalog, so any DNA collection references were cleared too.
searchBrandImages: Search all images from this brand

membership.centerSubtitle: Redeem a code or contact our concierge to unlock AI assistant quota and the full runway report archive.
membership.memberPlanDetail: Includes {{aiLimit}} AI assistant chats per day and resets at {{time}}.
membership.freeSummary: {{remaining}} of {{aiLimit}} complimentary AI assistant chats remain.
membership.memberSummary: Your account now carries {{aiLimit}} AI assistant chats per day and full report access.
membership.reportsLockedSummary: Runway reports unlock once membership is activated.
membership.reportsUnlockedSummary: The full runway report archive is open on this account.
membership.aiCardTitle: Search and reason across color, silhouette, brands, and runway references
membership.aiCardBody: Free users can explore the baseline quota, while members gain a higher daily ceiling for sustained dialogue and rapid lookups.
membership.reportsLockedTitle: Full runway reports and archive access require membership
membership.reportsUnlockedTitle: This account already unlocks the full runway archive
membership.reportsCardBody: Inspiration remains free. Runway flash issues, deeper breakdowns, and archive browsing are covered by membership access.
membership.conciergeTitle: Get redemption help and activation support on WeChat
membership.conciergeBody: If your code is issued through our concierge, add the official WeChat account first and complete redemption here afterward.
membership.chatLimitMessage: Your AI assistant quota is exhausted. Redeem a membership code to continue chatting.
membership.chatLockedMessage: AI assistant access is not enabled on this account yet. Open membership to continue.
membership.profileHint: Your AI assistant quota and report access status stay synced here.

dragImageHint: Drag images into the composer for analysis.
dragImageReplaceHint: You can keep dragging more images into the composer.
dropImageHint: Reference images can be added directly to this session.
favoriteCollectionCreateHint: Create a DNA collection for one clear visual direction, then keep refining it with references and notes.
favoriteCollectionDeleteConfirmHint: "{{name}}" and its DNA profile will be removed together. This cannot be undone.
favoriteUploadQueueHint: Images upload directly to storage first, then index asynchronously into the DNA collection. A single failure will not block the whole batch.
favoriteUploadBatchPartialFailed: Batch upload completed with partial failures: {{completed}} succeeded, {{failed}} failed.
favoriteUploadBatchFailed: The batch upload did not complete. Please retry the failed images.
favoriteUploadDropHint: You can also drag multiple images directly into this workspace.
favoriteUploadDropActiveHint: Files upload in batches and continue indexing into the DNA collection.
favoriteUploadFilteredFiles: {{count}} unsupported file(s) were skipped. JPG / PNG / WebP only.
favoriteUploadUnsupportedFiles: Only JPG, PNG, and WebP images are supported.

favoriteUploadJobStatus.partial_failed: Some images could not be processed

favoriteCollectionEmptyTitle: Start by defining a clear style DNA
favoriteCollectionWorkbenchEmptyHint: Upload your own references or keep saving platform images here; both will shape this DNA collection.
favoriteSelectionDeleteConfirmHint: {{count}} images will be removed and this DNA collection will be recalculated.
